name: U.S. Bancorp Depositary Shares Each representing a 1/100th interest in a share of Series A Non-CumulativePerpetual Pfd Stock
summary: U.S. Bancorp is a financial services holding company offering a variety of banking, investment, mortgage, trust, and payment services products to individual consumers, businesses, and institutions. USB^A represents a depositary share representing ownership in preferred stock. The company is headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota.
